name: Traptrix Arachnocampa
name_jp: キノの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. The first time each Set card in your Spell & Trap Zone would be destroyed by card effect each turn, it is not destroyed. During the Main Phase, if you control a "Traptrix" monster (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect or Plant monsters. You can only use this effect of "Traptrix Arachnocampa" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. The first time each Set card in your Spell & Trap Zone would be destroyed by card effect each turn, it is not destroyed. During the Main Phase, if you control a "Traptrix" monster (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect or Plant monsters. You can only use this effect of "Traptrix Arachnocampa" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix
Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix - The Legend of Duelist Quarter Century Edition

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
